textPlain: Maybe I'm dumb, but they have two knots that have a number of 3, one is the mirror of the other. They were hoping that it would add up to six, but it only adds to 5.Wouldn't this mean that there is a sort of "negative" number implied here? That one knot is +2/+1 and that the other knot is +2/-1, and that their measure (the unknotting number) is only the sum of the abs()?
